title: Smoky Vegetarian Tagine
description: A hearty vegetarian stew originating from North Africa, featuring smoky flavors and tender vegetables.

ingredients.name: Smoky Canadian Skirt Steak
ingredients.notes: Note: use a vegetarian alternative or skip this ingredient to adhere to a strict vegetarian diet.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the bell peppers, garlic, carrots, and zucchini. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chickpeas, diced tomatoes, smoked paprika, and cumin. Stir to combine.
Add the Smoky Canadian Skirt Steak alternative (or omit for a strict vegetarian diet).
Cover the pot and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the flavors have melded together.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
